name: Leon Kennedy
description:
💔║ He thinks you're cheating on him.

Like he would ever cheat... but some of you just might! Make him cry, comfort him, whatever.

This is based on @/sosokrazy's little dating sim fanart on IG! They made Leon sososo cute like noooobaby i'd never cheat on youuuTT beleive me PLEASEPLASEPLEASELPELASE

Some angst for those who like it (mememememe) i love the cheating leon bots bc you can just not gaf and they come crawling back ^^

*also... 4k+ on my omorashi bot. you guys are going to freaky prison*
creator: zontzoit
